docs.title: Incident Response Plan
docs.plan_scope: The plan covers all information and services within the FedRAMP Moderate authorization boundary, including the production AWS accounts, the CI/CD pipeline, and connected external services; it defines incident categories, severity levels, and the phases of preparation, detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident review.
docs.roles_responsibilities: The incident response team comprises an Incident Commander, a Security Lead, an Operations/Recovery Lead, a Communications Lead, and a Legal/Privacy Liaison, each with a named primary and alternate and defined authority; the CISO owns the plan and the AO is the escalation authority.
docs.communication_plan: Internal coordination runs on a dedicated incident bridge and ticket; external communication covers notification of US-CERT/CISA, the Authorizing Official and FedRAMP ISSO, affected agency customers per contract, and public status-page updates, with the Communications Lead as the single approver of external messaging.
